description: Style NoteThese ankle boots from woodland celebrate the true spirit of adventure and are designed for comfort under extreme conditions. Product Details High-top boots with a raised heel Brand badge on the lateral side of the heelFive-hole lace ups with metal ringsPadded tongue and insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticOutsole with lugs and grooves, reinforced onto the upper at the toe box Material and Care Nubuck Use a branded leather conditioner and polish on leather partsUse a suede brush to remove dist from suede partsDo not store in direct sunlight
